Dune: Part Two (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $282,709,065Details
International Box Office $432,497,130
Worldwide Box Office $715,206,195
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $2,774,152
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $10,527,128
Total $13,301,280
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The mythic journey of Paul Atreides continues, as he unites with Chani and the Fremen while on a path of revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the known universe, he endeavors to prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$82,505,391 (29.2% of total gross)
Legs:3.43 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:39.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$190,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,071 opening theaters/4,074 max. theaters, 6.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $298,956,717

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 25th, 2024 (Special Engagement) by Warner Bros. (IMAX Fan First Exclusive)
March 1st, 2024 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
March 1st, 2024 (IMAX) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: February 28th, 2024 (Wide) (Sweden)
February 28th, 2024 (Wide) (Belgium)
February 28th, 2024 (Wide), released as Dynni: Osa kaksi (Finland)
February 28th, 2024 (Wide), released as Dune: Part Two (듄: 파트2) (South Korea)
February 28th, 2024 (IMAX) (South Korea)
Video Release: April 16th, 2024 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for sequences of strong violence, some suggestive material and brief strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2803 (cert #54589), 10/4/2023)
Running Time: 165 minutes
Franchise: Dune
Award nomination: 2025 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Filming location (country): Hungary, Italy, Jordan, Namibia
Filming location (state or county): Abu Dhabi
Plot point: War
Release detail: Disrupted by 2023 WGA & SAG Strikes

Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Warner Bros., Legendary Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

The mythic journey of Paul Atreides continues, as he unites with Chani and the Fremen while on a path of revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the known universe, he endeavors to prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.
